creator: sh@keff.org
text:
Hi

I seemed to have made a little mistake by posting the stack-trace under 
the "fix"-section. This is of course not a fix.


Some more information:

HP DL360 G3
CPU: Intel(R) Xeon(TM) CPU 2.80GHz (2799.22-MHz 686-class CPU)
  Logical CPUs per core: 2
FreeBSD/SMP: Multiprocessor System Detected: 2 CPUs
 cpu0 (BSP): APIC ID:  6
 cpu1 (AP/HT): APIC ID:  7

Sincerely,
Sebastian H
